channel.title: MR-PATH on Daniel Iong
channel.description: Recent content in MR-PATH on Daniel Iong

item.description: MR-PATH is a latent mixture model for heterogeneous causal mechanisms in Mendelian Randomization. See below for more information about the method. PDF Github Poster University of Exeter 9/24/20 Presentation Slides Interactive Plots The function MRPATH_scatterplot in the MRPATH R package has an interactive option that creates a plot_ly scatter-plot which displays information about the SNPs and the model fit as you hover over it. If you hover over the points, you will get the RSID and the cluster membership probabilities from the MR-PATH model of that particular SNP.
